title: 3 Dividend Kings Among 22 Companies To Announce Annual Dividend Increases In First Half Of February
text: There is a slew of dividend increases coming in February, including from dividend kings Genuine Parts, 3M, and PepsiCo in the first half of the month. Other popular stocks that traditionally announce annual increases in early February are Sherwin-Williams and Cisco.

title: The Dividend Kings Ranked By Quality Score
text: Dividend Kings have an astounding track record of 50 or more years of higher dividend payouts. I rank the Dividend Kings using Quality Snapshots, a simple yet elegant system for assessing the quality of dividend growth stocks.

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Slow And Steady
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Genuine Parts Company to Report Fourth Quarter 2022 Results on February 23, 2023 and Host Investor Day on March 23, 2023
text: ATLANTA , Jan. 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Genuine Parts Company (NYSE: GPC) will release fourth quarter and full-year 2022 results on February 23, 2023. Management will also conduct a conference call on this date at 11:00 a.m.

title: This Dividend King Is Crushing the Market: These 2 Competitors Are Better Buys
text: Three winners all, but two have been vastly better investments.

title: Is This Dividend King a Bond Substitute?
text: When thinking about an uncertain investing future, the most prudent course is to buy bonds, which are loans to governments and financially strong businesses. However, bonds normally have fixed terms and fixed yields, exposing them to inflation and opportunity-cost risks.

title: Why Genuine Parts Raced 23% Higher in 2022
text: The aftermarket auto parts retailer raked in record sales and profits last year.

title: Here's 1 Sign of a Great Dividend Stock
text: The best dividend stocks don't just make their payments; they increase them.

title: 2 Dividend Stocks That Will Pay You for Life
text: There's nothing quite like making money in your sleep.
